user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Nespresso
Product type: Vertuo coffee machine
Tone: premium, modern, convenient
Visual style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Brewed to Perfection, Vertically.
brief.caption: A sunlit modern kitchen with a pristine marble countertop, where the Vertuo machine stands majestically. A freshly brewed coffee cup emits swirling steam, with coffee pods artfully scattered beside it, reflecting an aura of sophistication.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors.
brief.typography_style: Elegant serif for headlines, sleek sans-serif for body text
brief.color_scheme: deep espresso brown, glossy black, and creamy white
